// frontend/src/components/ParticleCanvas.jsx
import{useRef,useEffect}from"react";import*as THREE from"three";import{OrbitControls}from"three/examples/jsm/controls/OrbitControls";import{CSS2DRenderer,CSS2DObject}from"three/examples/jsm/renderers/CSS2DRenderer";import{createSun,createPlanets}from"../utils/solarSystem";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function ParticleCanvas(_ref){let{userid,stage,status,startSimulation,pauseSimulation,changeStage}=_ref;const mountRef=useRef();const changeStageRef=useRef(changeStage);useEffect(()=>{changeStageRef.current=changeStage;},[changeStage]);useEffect(()=>{const mount=mountRef.current;if(!mount)return;const width=mount.clientWidth;const height=mount.clientHeight;// --- Scene & Camera ---
const scene=new THREE.Scene();scene.background=new THREE.Color(0x000000);const camera=new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(60,width/height,1,50000);camera.position.set(0,2500,10000);// --- Renderer ---
const renderer=new THREE.WebGLRenderer({antialias:true});renderer.setSize(width,height);mount.appendChild(renderer.domElement);// --- CSS2DRenderer for Labels ---
const labelRenderer=new CSS2DRenderer();labelRenderer.setSize(width,height);labelRenderer.domElement.style.position="absolute";labelRenderer.domElement.style.top="0";mount.appendChild(labelRenderer.domElement);// --- Controls ---
const controls=new OrbitControls(camera,labelRenderer.domElement);controls.enableDamping=true;controls.enablePan=false;// --- Lights ---
const ambientLight=new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff,0.35);scene.add(ambientLight);const sunLight=new THREE.PointLight(0xffffff,2.2,0,2);sunLight.position.set(0,0,0);sunLight.userData.isStageObject=true;scene.add(sunLight);let stageObject=null;let sun=null;let planets=[];// --- Big Bang Animation State ---
let bigBangStartTime=null;let isBigBangAnimating=false;const BIGBANG_DURATION=5000;// 5 seconds
const setupStage=()=>{scene.children.filter(obj=>obj.userData.isStageObject).forEach(obj=>scene.remove(obj));stageObject=null;sun=null;planets=[];// --- Solar System ---
if(stage==="solar_system"){sun=createSun(CSS2DObject);sun.userData.isStageObject=true;scene.add(sun);planets=createPlanets(scene,CSS2DObject);planets.forEach(p=>{p.mesh.userData.isStageObject=true;});camera.position.set(0,500,2500);controls.target.set(0,0,0);controls.update();}// --- BigBang ---
if(stage==="bigbang"){const geometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numParticles=800000;const positions=new Float32Array(numParticles*3);const initialPositions=new Float32Array(numParticles*3);const colors=new Float32Array(numParticles*3);const color=new THREE.Color();// Start with particles very close to origin (pre-Big Bang high density state)
for(let i=0;i<numParticles;i++){const r=Math.random()*50;// 매우 작은 반지름으로 시작 (고밀도)
const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;initialPositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);initialPositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);initialPositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 흰색으로 설정
color.setRGB(1,1,1);colors[i*3]=color.r;colors[i*3+1]=color.g;colors[i*3+2]=color.b;// 초기 위치 저장
positions[i*3]=initialPositions[i*3];positions[i*3+1]=initialPositions[i*3+1];positions[i*3+2]=initialPositions[i*3+2];}geometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(positions,3));geometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(colors,3));stageObject=new THREE.Points(geometry,new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:3,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true}));stageObject.userData.isStageObject=true;stageObject.userData.initialPositions=initialPositions;stageObject.userData.geometry=geometry;scene.add(stageObject);// Start Big Bang animation
bigBangStartTime=Date.now();isBigBangAnimating=true;camera.position.set(0,0,2000);controls.target.set(0,0,0);controls.update();}// --- Galaxy Formation ---
if(stage==="galaxy_formation"){const group=new THREE.Group();const numParticles=600000;const geometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const positions=new Float32Array(numParticles*3);const colors=new Float32Array(numParticles*3);const sizes=new Float32Array(numParticles);const color=new THREE.Color();// 실제 별의 색상 스펙트럼 (온도에 따른 색상)
const starColors=[{r:0.6,g:0.7,b:1.0},// 파란색 (고온)
{r:0.8,g:0.85,b:1.0},// 청백색
{r:1.0,g:1.0,b:1.0},// 흰색
{r:1.0,g:0.95,b:0.8},// 노란색
{r:1.0,g:0.85,b:0.6},// 주황색
{r:1.0,g:0.7,b:0.5}// 빨간색 (저온)
];for(let i=0;i<numParticles;i++){// 나선은하 구조 생성 (로그 나선)
const spiralArms=2;const armIndex=Math.floor(Math.random()*spiralArms);const baseAngle=armIndex/spiralArms*Math.PI*2;// 거리 분포 (중심부에 더 많은 별)
const rBase=Math.random();const r=Math.pow(rBase,0.5)*6000;// 로그 나선 각도 계산
const spiralTightness=0.3;const theta=baseAngle+Math.log(r/100+1)*spiralTightness+(Math.random()-0.5)*0.4;// 나선팔의 두께 (거리가 멀수록 더 넓게)
const armThickness=(0.1+Math.random()*0.15)*(1+r/4000);const radialOffset=(Math.random()-0.5)*armThickness;const finalR=Math.max(0,r+radialOffset);// Y축 압축 (은하 원반 구조)
const yCompression=0.12+Math.random()*0.08;const yOffset=(Math.random()-0.5)*200*yCompression;positions[i*3]=finalR*Math.cos(theta);positions[i*3+1]=yOffset;positions[i*3+2]=finalR*Math.sin(theta);// 거리에 따른 색상 선택
// 중심부: 더 밝고 파란 별들, 외곽: 노란색/빨간색
let colorIndex;const normalizedR=r/6000;if(normalizedR<0.3){// 중심부 - 밝고 파란 별들
colorIndex=Math.floor(Math.random()*3);// 파란색, 청백색, 흰색
}else if(normalizedR<0.7){// 중간부 - 흰색, 노란색
colorIndex=2+Math.floor(Math.random()*2);// 흰색, 노란색
}else{// 외곽부 - 노란색, 주황색, 빨간색
colorIndex=3+Math.floor(Math.random()*3);// 노란색, 주황색, 빨간색
}const starColor=starColors[colorIndex];const brightness=0.7+Math.random()*0.3;// 밝기 변화
color.setRGB(starColor.r*brightness,starColor.g*brightness,starColor.b*brightness);colors[i*3]=color.r;colors[i*3+1]=color.g;colors[i*3+2]=color.b;// 크기도 다양하게 - 중심부의 별이 더 크고 밝음
const baseSize=1.5+Math.random()*1.5;sizes[i]=baseSize*(1+(1-normalizedR)*0.5);}geometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(positions,3));geometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(colors,3));geometry.setAttribute("size",new THREE.BufferAttribute(sizes,1));// 별들을 위한 쉐이더 머티리얼
const stars=new THREE.Points(geometry,new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:2.5,vertexColors:true,blending:THREE.AdditiveBlending,transparent:true,opacity:1.0,sizeAttenuation:true,depthWrite:false}));group.add(stars);// 중심부에 밝은 별 클러스터 추가
const centerGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const centerParticles=50000;const centerPositions=new Float32Array(centerParticles*3);const centerColors=new Float32Array(centerParticles*3);const centerSizes=new Float32Array(centerParticles);for(let i=0;i<centerParticles;i++){const r=Math.random()*800;// 중심부만
const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;centerPositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);centerPositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta)*0.2;centerPositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 중심부는 더 밝고 파란색
const brightness=0.9+Math.random()*0.1;color.setRGB(0.7*brightness,0.8*brightness,1.0*brightness);centerColors[i*3]=color.r;centerColors[i*3+1]=color.g;centerColors[i*3+2]=color.b;centerSizes[i]=2+Math.random()*2;}centerGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(centerPositions,3));centerGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(centerColors,3));centerGeometry.setAttribute("size",new THREE.BufferAttribute(centerSizes,1));const centerStars=new THREE.Points(centerGeometry,new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:3,vertexColors:true,blending:THREE.AdditiveBlending,transparent:true,opacity:1.0,sizeAttenuation:true,depthWrite:false}));group.add(centerStars);group.userData.isStageObject=true;stageObject=group;scene.add(stageObject);camera.position.set(0,200,1500);controls.target.set(0,0,0);controls.update();}};setupStage();let frameId;const animate=()=>{// 카메라 거리에 따라 파티클 크기 조정 (축소 시 채워지게)
const cameraDistance=camera.position.distanceTo(controls.target);if(stage==="solar_system"&&sun){sun.rotation.y+=0.002;planets.forEach(p=>{p.angle+=p.speed;p.mesh.position.x=p.radius*Math.cos(p.angle);p.mesh.position.z=p.radius*Math.sin(p.angle);});}else if(stage==="bigbang"&&stageObject&&isBigBangAnimating){// Big Bang explosion animation
const elapsed=Date.now()-bigBangStartTime;const progress=Math.min(elapsed/BIGBANG_DURATION,1);// Exponential expansion (matches cosmology inflation model)
const expansionFactor=Math.pow(progress*60+1,2);// 1 ~ 3721
const positions=stageObject.geometry.attributes.position.array;const initialPositions=stageObject.userData.initialPositions;for(let i=0;i<positions.length;i+=3){positions[i]=initialPositions[i]*expansionFactor;positions[i+1]=initialPositions[i+1]*expansionFactor;positions[i+2]=initialPositions[i+2]*expansionFactor;}stageObject.geometry.attributes.position.needsUpdate=true;// Also add slow rotation for visual effect
stageObject.rotation.y+=0.0005;// 카메라 거리에 따라 파티클 크기 조정 (축소 시 채워지게)
const baseSize=3;const distanceFactor=Math.max(1,cameraDistance/2000);stageObject.material.size=baseSize*distanceFactor;// When animation completes, transition to galaxy_formation
if(progress>=1){isBigBangAnimating=false;// Small delay before transition
setTimeout(()=>{changeStageRef.current("galaxy_formation");},500);}}else if(stage==="bigbang"&&stageObject&&!isBigBangAnimating){// Big Bang 완료 후에도 파티클 크기 조정
const baseSize=3;const distanceFactor=Math.max(1,cameraDistance/2000);stageObject.material.size=baseSize*distanceFactor;stageObject.rotation.y+=0.0005;}else if(stage==="galaxy_formation"&&stageObject){// 은하 회전
stageObject.rotation.y+=0.0003;// 카메라 거리에 따라 파티클 크기 조정 (축소 시 채워지게)
const baseSize=2.5;const distanceFactor=Math.max(1,cameraDistance/1500);stageObject.children.forEach(child=>{if(child.material){child.material.size=baseSize*distanceFactor;}});}controls.update();renderer.render(scene,camera);labelRenderer.render(scene,camera);frameId=requestAnimationFrame(animate);};animate();const onResize=()=>{const newWidth=mount.clientWidth;const newHeight=mount.clientHeight;camera.aspect=newWidth/newHeight;camera.updateProjectionMatrix();renderer.setSize(newWidth,newHeight);labelRenderer.setSize(newWidth,newHeight);};window.addEventListener("resize",onResize);return()=>{cancelAnimationFrame(frameId);window.removeEventListener("resize",onResize);renderer.dispose();mount.removeChild(renderer.domElement);mount.removeChild(labelRenderer.domElement);};},[stage]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{position:"fixed",top:0,left:0,width:"100vw",height:"100vh"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{ref:mountRef,style:{width:"100%",height:"100%"}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{position:"absolute",top:10,left:10,zIndex:100,display:"flex",gap:"8px"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:startSimulation,children:"Start"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:pauseSimulation,children:status==="paused"?"Resume":"Pause"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>changeStage("bigbang"),children:"BigBang"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>changeStage("galaxy_formation"),children:"Galaxy"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>changeStage("solar_system"),children:"SolarSystem"})]})]});}
